proposal1.heroHeadline: WRTR is losing $96,300 a year to inefficient proposal processes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Current manual proposals take 4 hours. Automate them to 47 seconds with AI, tailored for WRTR's services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every day, WRTR loses measurable revenue from inefficiencies.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: WRTR's strategists spend 60 hours monthly on proposals, costing $54,000 annually. That's time not spent on client engagement.

problems.title: Revenue Leakage
problems.description: Missed follow-ups result in potential revenue loss of $22,500 annually. Timely responses mean more closed deals.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: With a 4-hour proposal turnaround, competitors respond faster. Each delayed response risks losing a $15,000 project.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually crafted proposals often miss WRTR's unique messaging, risking $5,000 in brand value dilution per proposal.

problems.title: Scaling Bottleneck
problems.description: The current process limits WRTR to 15 proposals monthly. This caps potential revenue growth at $180,000 annually.

problems.title: Missed Insights
problems.description: Without behavioral tracking, WRTR misses $7,800 worth of actionable client insights each year, reducing conversion rates.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Introducing our AI system that transforms each listed problem into measurable efficiency.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, WRTR spends 4 hours crafting a proposal. Our system completes it in 47 seconds, freeing up $54,000 annually in strategist time.

solutions.title: Automated Follow-Ups
solutions.description: Missed follow-ups cost WRTR $22,500 annually. Our AI handles 24/7 client engagement, capturing more opportunities.

solutions.title: Rapid Response Advantage
solutions.description: 4-hour turnarounds let competitors get ahead. AI-generated proposals in seconds position WRTR as the industry leader.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistent messaging risks $5,000 per proposal. Our system ensures every document aligns with WRTR's brand.

solutions.title: Behavioral Insights
solutions.description: Missed insights from proposal interactions cost $7,800 annually. Our tracking provides actionable data, improving conversions.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for WRTR's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for WRTR around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for WRTR.

proposal2.tag: Proposal for Cascade Health Systems // Confidential
proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Cascade Health Systems with a 2.5x Increase in Patient Engagement
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our 6-month engagement will enhance your digital presence, resulting in a 2.5x increase in patient engagement and satisfaction.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Cascade Health Systems is currently experiencing measurable financial and operational losses.

problems.title: High Website Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor leaving without engaging costs you $32 in lost potential revenue. With 3,000 visitors monthly, that's $1,152,000 annually.

problems.title: Ineffective Ad Spend
problems.description: Your current ad spend results in a 20% ROI. Industry average is 35%, losing you approximately $240,000 annually.

problems.title: Low Patient Retention
problems.description: A 15% patient churn results in $400,000 lost revenue each year due to lack of follow-up engagement.

problems.title: Suboptimal Social Media Engagement
problems.description: Your social media channels lag, with a 1% engagement rate versus the 3% industry standard. This equates to 7,000 fewer interactions monthly.

problems.title: Underutilized CRM System
problems.description: Your CRM system operates at 60% efficiency, costing you 200 staff hours monthly, valued at $18,000.

problems.title: Poor Email Campaign Performance
problems.description: Current email campaigns yield a 0.5% conversion rate, missing out on $350,000 in potential revenue annually.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these losses by optimizing engagement and operational efficiency.

solutions.title: Digital Presence Optimization
solutions.description: Solves high bounce rate. We will redesign your website for a seamless user experience. Deliverables include a responsive design and improved load times. Expect a 50% reduction in bounce rate.

solutions.title: Targeted Advertising Campaigns
solutions.description: Addresses ineffective ad spend. We will craft targeted campaigns using data-driven insights. Deliverables include ad strategy and creative assets. Expect a 20% increase in ROI.

solutions.title: CRM Efficiency Enhancement
solutions.description: Optimizes CRM usage. We will fully integrate and streamline your CRM system. Deliverables include training sessions and process automation. Expect a 30% reduction in time spent on administrative tasks.

solutions.title: Email Campaign Revamp
solutions.description: Improves email conversion rates. We will refine your email strategy with personalized content. Deliverables include segmented lists and compelling templates. Expect a 2% increase in conversion rates.

metrics.label: Increase in patient engagement in 6 months.
Increase in ROI from targeted advertising within 3 months.
Reduction in CRM-related staff hours in 4 months.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Strategies

whyUsCards.title: Custom Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We tailor our services to meet your specific needs, ensuring relevant and impactful outcomes.

lead.company_description:
We are hard-wired to drive predictable revenue for our clients by unlocking, automating, and augmenting their funnels, pipeline, and operations for a de-costed, de-risked path to maximum profitability at scale.
 
With over a decade of experience helping hundreds of businesses from start-ups to enterprises, spanning 4 continents and 20+ countries we know what it takes to unlock our client's growth potential. We know exactly what it takes to open doors for our clients by getting them in front of the right decision-makers, with the right message at the right time!


Our talent and team augmentation solutions are geared perfectly to complement the revenue growth that we unlock and bestow on our clients, ensuring a more seamless, profitable path as they scale. Augmentix by Team Rocket unlocks our clients and their internal teams from repetitive operational tasks, circumnavigating bottlenecks and overloads by plugging flexible, remote, global talent, experts in their fields.
